title: Strawberry Apples (Celeste)
description: Turns apples to strawberries from Celeste!
body:
## Changes apples to the strawberries from [Celeste](https://www.celestegame.com/)!

![All Strawberries](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TQGCfG3s/images/3762fcd53244c8ad3d41300ce99f9a140865fd61.png)

# 

### Compatiblities:
- [**Eating Animation**](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)
- Renames "Apple" to "Strawberry" in all **English** Language Settings

# 

<details>
<summary>Note</summary>

I did not make any of these textures, all credit goes to the creators of [Celeste](https://www.celestegame.com/).

The only texture I "made" was the Golden Strawberry, where I removed the crown from the Crowned Golden Strawberry and added the hull/calyx/cap of the strawberry instead.

Also genuinely, [Celeste](https://www.celestegame.com/) is such a good game.

</details>
